response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and demonstrates technical leadership in developer tools and infrastructure (e.g., test automation, CI/CD, GitLab setup). However, his people management experience is limited to informal mentorship and team leadership rather than formal management roles. While he has mobile platform experience (Apple TV/iOS apps), his direct experience with developer tools for large-scale mobile ecosystems is not clearly evidenced. His lack of explicit organizational change leadership also reduces his fit for the preferred criteria.
strengths: Strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing, and CI/CD infrastructure
Proven track record in building and maintaining developer-facing systems (e.g., GISCollective, MCP code generators)
Hands-on coding experience across multiple languages and platforms, including mobile
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (no direct reports or structured team leadership)
Lack of explicit experience with large-scale mobile platform developer tools (primary focus appears broader)
No clear evidence of leading organizational change initiatives
